mapper.select: SELECT id FROM community_tag WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_tag SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_tag SET usage_count = GREATEST(usage_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM community_post_tag WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_ai = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_post_tag WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_ai = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post_tag (post_id, tag_id, is_ai) VALUES (#{postId}, #{tagId}, #{isAi}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_ai = VALUES(is_ai)
mapper.select: SELECT t.name FROM community_post_tag pt JOIN community_tag t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE pt.post_id = #{postId}
